meaning: n.工程师,技师,火车司机,轮机员,工兵
examples: His father meant him to be an engineer.
We engaged the services of a famous engineer.
He looked at the design with the eye of an engineer.
The former Motorola engineer Marty Cooper, in fact, made the first-ever wireless phone call in 1973.
She spent her days in the lab, trying to figure out how to genetically engineer plants.
